concerns.text: T023 restricts VIF calculation to 'Linear Regression baseline only'. This violates FR-009 which mandates VIF computation 'for each descriptor within the full multiple regression model'. The task silently narrows the scope of the requirement, excluding the tree-based models (RF/GB) from the mandated collinearity diagnostics.

T024 (permutation), T026 (bootstrap), and T030 (edge case handling) introduce a conditional skip for N < 50. While the plan mentions this, the spec (FR-006, FR-011) mandates these tests as system requirements without explicit conditional exemptions. T030 explicitly implements a 'skip' logic that weakens the mandatory nature of FR-006 and FR-011 unless the spec is amended to allow this staging.

T029 assigns the implementation of the mandatory disclaimer (FR-010) to `code/utils/logging.py`. FR-010 requires appending the string to 'all generated plots and the final report summary'. `logging.py` handles console logs, not file I/O for plot images or markdown report generation. This task location cannot satisfy the deliverable, effectively weakening the requirement.

T008 implements a 'fail with DATA_SOURCE_MISSING' if no verified URL is found. FR-001 states the system must 'download... from at least one open repository' and only flag a limitation if count < 500. The task's hard-fail logic on missing URLs is a stricter constraint than the spec, potentially rejecting valid execution paths if the specific research.md block is empty, violating the 'download from available sources' intent.
